exhibitors.description: Builds compact AUVs and inspection-class ROVs with OEM payload bays for dissolved-oxygen sensors.
Designs rugged underwater camera modules for farm pens and embeds third-party water-quality probes.
Distributor and sales agent for imported ROV and AUV brands; does not manufacture platforms.
Sensor-only dissolved oxygen and salinity probes for integration by platform partners.
Consulting team that operates rented ROVs for water testing projects.
Manufactures pen-cleaning ROVs with camera arrays and swappable sensor payloads.
Builds autonomous AUV scouts for aquaculture mapping and can OEM integrate oxygen payloads.
OEM underwater camera manufacturer for feeding analytics and low-light inspection.
Analytics dashboard using camera feeds from partner ROVs; no hardware manufacturing.
Regional reseller for imported inspection ROVs and replacement cameras.
Manufacturer of resident ROVs and AUV mapping pods with open integration APIs.
Builds freshwater AUVs for lake-health monitoring and welcomes sensor integration partners.
OEM underwater camera systems for cold-water aquaculture cages and autonomous docks.
Water-quality sensor vendor for oxygen, salinity, and turbidity probes.
Rental fleet and inspection services using ROVs manufactured by other companies.
Builds long-endurance AUVs and compact inspection ROVs for blue-economy monitoring.
OEM underwater camera maker with live stereo inspection rigs for ROV builders.
Manufacturer of modular ROVs with camera, sonar, and sensor expansion rails.
Dealer representing several ROV and AUV brands in Atlantic Canada.
Sensor-only chemistry probes for oxygen and nitrate telemetry.

meeting_interest.notes: Asked for OEM dissolved-oxygen payload pricing.
Camera product lead wants farm-pen sensor bundle.
Dealer interest only; no platform build authority.
Needs oxygen sensor support for ROV camera array.
AUV scout roadmap includes water-quality module.
Existing CRM customer; update with LakeHealth integration interest.
Asked for co-marketing around freshwater AUV integration.
Booked executive demo after live AUV run.

contact_hygiene.dedupe: Normalized email first; otherwise normalized phone plus normalized company name.

lead_followup.event_leads: Use event end date plus followup_days_after_end.
lead_followup.sponsor_finance: Use event end date plus sponsor_followup_days_after_end.

sponsor_status.not_sponsor: Canceled or no-show sponsor records are not active sponsors.
sponsor_status.open_invoice: Delivered invoice exists with an outstanding balance.
sponsor_status.paid_deferred: Invoice paid in full with deferred amount equal to the sponsorship amount.
sponsor_status.proposal_only: Sponsor package exists but no delivered invoice exists.
